# kemp_certificates (Data Source)

Lists all certificates stored on the Kemp LoadMaster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_certificates" "all" {}

output "cert_names" {
  value = [for c in data.kemp_certificates.all.certificates : c.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `certificates` (Attributes List) All certificates installed on the LoadMaster. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--certificates))

<a id="nestedatt--certificates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `certificates`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Certificate name.
- `type` (String) Certificate type as reported by LoadMaster (`cert`, `pfx`, etc.).
